word: H2385 - חֲזִיז - chăzîyz - khaw-zeez' - Bright cloud

sections.paragraph:
Original: חזיז

Transliteration: chăzı̂yz

Phonetic: khaw-zeez'

BDB Definition:

  1. thunderbolt, lightning flash, lightning, storm, cloud

Origin: from an unused root meaning to glare

TWOT entry: 635a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
